title: The Scarcity Mindset Tax That Costs You $1,800/Year
hook: Worrying about money actually makes you worse at managing it — and scientists have measured exactly how much it costs you.
angle: Poverty isn't just a money problem — it's a cognitive bandwidth problem. Financial stress literally steals IQ points, creating a measurable loop that traps people regardless of income.
audience: Anyone living paycheck to paycheck or feeling overwhelmed by financial decisions
key_numbers: 13 IQ points lost when money is scarce
$1,800/year lost to poor financial decisions under stress
43% of Americans report financial stress impairing daily function
bandwidth tax equivalent to missing a full night of sleep every day
